UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents an individual user's profile within TabEdge, linked to an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, typically linked to an external authentication system's user ID.

email.description: Primary email address of the user.

fullName.description: The full name of the user.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user profile was last updated.

Account.title: Account
Account.description: Represents a personal or business account created by a user within the TabEdge platform, under which financial activities are managed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Account entity.

ownerId.description: Reference to the UserProfile that owns this account. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Account)

name.description: A display name for the account (e.g., 'John Doe Personal', 'Acme Corp').

businessName.description: The official business name if the accountType is 'business'.

taxId.description: Tax identification number for business accounts (e.g., EIN, VAT ID).

addressStreet.description: The street address for the account.

addressCity.description: The city for the account's address.

addressState.description: The state or province for the account's address.

addressPostalCode.description: The postal code for the account's address.

addressCountry.description: The country for the account's address.

contactEmail.description: Primary contact email for this account.

contactPhone.description: Contact phone number for this account.

stripeAccountId.description: ID of the connected Stripe account for payment and treasury services.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the account was last updated.

Invoice.title: Invoice
Invoice.description: Represents an invoice created by an account to request payment from a customer.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Invoice entity.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account that created this invoice. (Relationship: Account 1:N Invoice)

invoiceNumber.description: A unique, user-friendly number for the invoice.

customerName.description: Name of the customer the invoice is for.

customerAddressStreet.description: The street address for the customer.

customerAddressCity.description: The city for the customer's address.

customerAddressState.description: The state or province for the customer's address.

customerAddressPostalCode.description: The postal code for the customer's address.

customerAddressCountry.description: The country for the customer's address.

issueDate.description: Date when the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: Date when the invoice is due.

currency.description: Currency code for the invoice amount (e.g., 'USD', 'BDT').

subtotalAmount.description: Sum of all line item totals before tax and discount.

taxAmount.description: Total tax applied to the invoice.

discountAmount.description: Total discount applied to the invoice.

totalAmount.description: Final total amount due for the invoice.

notes.description: Additional notes or instructions for the customer.

publicViewUrl.description: Public URL for customers to view and pay the invoice without logging in.

pdfDownloadUrl.description: URL to download the invoice as a PDF.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the invoice was last updated.

LineItem.title: LineItem
LineItem.description: Represents a single item or service included in an invoice.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LineItem entity.

invoiceId.description: Reference to the Invoice this line item belongs to. (Relationship: Invoice 1:N LineItem)

description.description: Description of the item or service.

quantity.description: The quantity of the item or service.

unitPrice.description: The price per unit of the item or service.

total.description: The total price for this line item (quantity * unitPrice).

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the line item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the line item was last updated.

PaymentLink.title: PaymentLink
PaymentLink.description: Represents a shareable payment link generated by an account to collect payments for specific items or services.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PaymentLink entity.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account that created this payment link. (Relationship: Account 1:N PaymentLink)

name.description: A descriptive name for the payment link (e.g., 'Web Design Service', 'Donation Link').

description.description: A detailed description of what the payment link is for.

amount.description: The fixed amount to be collected via this payment link.

currency.description: Currency code for the payment link amount.

status.description: Current status of the payment link (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'expired').

publicUrl.description: Public URL for customers to pay via this link without logging in.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment link was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the payment link was last updated.

Transaction.title: Transaction
Transaction.description: Represents a financial transaction (e.g., payment received, withdrawal, fee) associated with an account.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Transaction entity.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account this transaction belongs to. (Relationship: Account 1:N Transaction)

stripeTransactionId.description: The identifier for this transaction in Stripe's system.

amount.description: The gross amount of the transaction.

currency.description: Currency code of the transaction amount.

description.description: A brief description of the transaction.

sourceEntityId.description: Reference to the entity (Invoice, PaymentLink, Withdrawal) that initiated this transaction. (Relationship: Invoice/PaymentLink/Withdrawal 1:N Transaction)

customerName.description: Name of the customer for incoming payments.

customerEmail.description: Email of the customer for incoming payments.

transactionDate.description: Date and time when the transaction occurred.

feeAmount.description: Amount of fees deducted for this transaction.

netAmount.description: The net amount after fees for this transaction.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the transaction record was last updated.

Withdrawal.title: Withdrawal
Withdrawal.description: Represents a request by an account to withdraw collected funds to a linked treasury bank account or card.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Withdrawal entity.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account requesting the withdrawal. (Relationship: Account 1:N Withdrawal)

currency.description: Currency code of the withdrawal amount.

destinationFinancialAccountId.description: Reference to the TreasuryBankAccount ID where funds are to be sent. (Relationship: TreasuryBankAccount 1:N Withdrawal)

stripePayoutId.description: The identifier for this payout in Stripe's system.

transactionId.description: Reference to the Transaction entity created for this withdrawal. (Relationship: Withdrawal 1:1 Transaction)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the withdrawal request was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the withdrawal request was last updated.

TreasuryBankAccount.title: TreasuryBankAccount
TreasuryBankAccount.description: Represents a virtual bank account issued through Stripe Treasury for a TabEdge account.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TreasuryBankAccount entity.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account that owns this treasury bank account. (Relationship: Account 1:N TreasuryBankAccount)

stripeFinancialAccountId.description: The identifier for the financial account in Stripe's system.

routingNumber.description: The routing number for the bank account.

bankName.description: The name of the bank (e.g., 'Stripe Treasury').

currency.description: Currency supported by this bank account.

status.description: Current status of the bank account (e.g., 'active', 'inactive', 'closed').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the treasury bank account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the treasury bank account was last updated.

TreasuryCard.title: TreasuryCard
TreasuryCard.description: Represents a virtual or physical card issued through Stripe Treasury for a TabEdge account.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TreasuryCard entity.

accountId.description: Reference to the Account that owns this treasury card. (Relationship: Account 1:N TreasuryCard)

stripeCardId.description: The identifier for the card in Stripe's issuing system.

last4.description: The last four digits of the card number.

billingAddressStreet.description: The street address for the card's billing address.

billingAddressCity.description: The city for the card's billing address.

billingAddressState.description: The state or province for the card's billing address.

billingAddressPostalCode.description: The postal code for the card's billing address.

billingAddressCountry.description: The country for the card's billing address.

currency.description: Currency for transactions with this card.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the treasury card was issued.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the treasury card was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profile information, uniquely identified by their Firebase Authentication UID. The 'id' field within the document must match the '{userId}' in the path, ensuring direct ownership and authorization independence.

Represents a user's personal or business account. Nested under the owning user's profile. The 'ownerId' field within the document must match the '{userId}' in the path, ensuring authorization independence.

Invoices created by a specific account. Nested under the respective account. The 'accountId' field within the document must match the '{accountId}' in the path, providing authorization independence and enabling QAPs for listing invoices for an account. Supports public read-only access for individual documents via 'publicViewUrl' field.
Individual line items associated with a specific invoice. Nested under the invoice. The 'invoiceId' field within the document must match the '{invoiceId}' in the path for authorization independence.

Payment links generated by a specific account. Nested under the respective account. The 'accountId' field within the document must match the '{accountId}' in the path, providing authorization independence and enabling QAPs for listing payment links for an account. Supports public read-only access for individual documents via 'publicUrl' field.

Financial transactions associated with a specific account. Nested under the respective account. The 'accountId' field within the document must match the '{accountId}' in the path, providing authorization independence and enabling QAPs for listing transactions for an account.

Withdrawal requests made from a specific account. Nested under the respective account. The 'accountId' field within the document must match the '{accountId}' in the path, providing authorization independence and enabling QAPs for listing withdrawals for an account.

Virtual bank accounts issued via Stripe Treasury for a specific account. Nested under the respective account. The 'accountId' field within the document must match the '{accountId}' in the path, providing authorization independence and enabling QAPs for listing bank accounts for an account.

Virtual or physical cards issued via Stripe Treasury for a specific account. Nested under the respective account. The 'accountId' field within the document must match the '{accountId}' in the path, providing authorization independence and enabling QAPs for listing cards for an account.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for TabEdge is designed to prioritize security, scalability, and debuggability, strictly adhering to the core design principles and strategy mandates. The primary strategy employed is **Authorization Independence via Denormalization** and **Structural Segregation**, ensuring that security rules are simple, robust, and easily debuggable.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):**
This design achieves authorization independence by consistently using path-based ownership and denormalizing parent IDs into child documents. For instance, `Account` documents are stored under `/userProfiles/{userId}/accounts/{accountId}`, where `userId` is the Firebase Auth UID. Each `Account` document explicitly contains an `ownerId` field that matches the `{userId}` from its parent path. Similarly, all subsequent subcollections like `Invoices`, `PaymentLinks`, `Transactions`, `Withdrawals`, `TreasuryBankAccounts`, and `TreasuryCards` are nested under `/userProfiles/{userId}/accounts/{accountId}/...`. Each document in these subcollections explicitly includes an `accountId` field that matches the `{accountId}` from its parent path.

This nesting and denormalization eliminate the need for `get()` calls in Firestore Security Rules to determine ownership. For example, to check if a user can access an invoice, the rule only needs to verify `request.auth.uid == userId` (from the path) and `resource.data.accountId == accountId` (from the path). This makes rules atomic, efficient, and significantly easier to write and debug, as authorization logic is self-contained within the document's path and its own fields.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**
The structure inherently supports Query-Aware Permissions (QAPs) by utilizing hierarchical paths for user-owned data and denormalized IDs. When a user queries for their accounts (`/userProfiles/{userId}/accounts`), the security rule `allow list: if request.auth.uid == userId;` naturally constrains the query results to only the accounts owned by the authenticated user. Firestore ensures that any `list` operation on such a collection will only return documents whose path matches the `userId` of the authenticated user, thus preventing unauthorized data leakage through broad queries.

The same principle applies to all subcollections. A query for `/userProfiles/{userId}/accounts/{accountId}/invoices` with `allow list: if request.auth.uid == userId;` will only return invoices belonging to the specified account, owned by the authenticated user. The denormalized `accountId` within the invoice documents further allows for direct filtering on `accountId` in queries, which aligns perfectly with QAPs. The `status` field for entities like `Invoice` and `PaymentLink` further supports this by allowing status-specific queries (e.g., all 'paid' invoices for an account).

For the public sharing feature of Invoices and Payment Links (via `publicViewUrl`), the design segregates public access from private list access. Authenticated users access their invoices through their private, path-secured collections. Public viewing for specific documents would be handled by highly restrictive `read` rules on specific document IDs, activated only when a document's `publicViewUrl` and `status` explicitly permit public, unauthenticated access. This prevents broad public `list` operations on the main collections while allowing targeted public reads.
